title: Web hyperlinks aren't working
creator: john391
content:
Earlier in the year I installed Thunderbird onto a new PC having previously used an older version on an older PC. When visiting a web site (and clicking on an email hyperlink there) my previous version used to automatically launch Thunderbird but the new version doesn't do that any more (i.e. clicking email hyperlinks doesn't do anything at all)

I'm running on Windows 10 and using Thunderbird version 150.0.2. I this likely to be due to some setting in Thunderbird? Or is it maybe something I need to configure in Windows?

title: Unable to download emails
creator: rc.woolfenden
content:
I started getting this message when I attempt to download my email to Thunderbird:

"Unable to write the email to the mailbox. Make sure the file system allows you write privileges, and you have enough disk space to copy the mailbox."

I am using AOL with the address: rc.woolfenden@verizon.net on a Windows 11 platform with a 1TB solid state hard drive. I have never encountered this issue before.

R.C. Woolfenden

title: Thunderbird won't play sound on new message. (Xubuntu 26.04)
creator: marsdenf
content: Using a new, clean install of Xubuntu 26.04, with thunderbird 140.10.2esr 64 bit, ubuntu snap build 1.0. In settings: play a sound when new message arrives, no sound is heard. When clicking "play" to test the sound, there is no sound. Also, if "use the following sound file" is checked, there is no sound when "play" is clicked. (I have tried various .wav and .mp3 files.) I have installed pipewire-alsa, but that didn't help. Any ideas?

title: Move email contacts from People folder back to New Email Add Recipient folder do to Mozilla update error.
creator: raymond_j_markiewicz
content:
In Firefox, to send an email, you click on the NEW EMAIL button in the tool bar and the email app appears. When you click on the TO button to add email addresses, the ADD RECIPIENT page appears and a list of people and their email addresses normally appear.

THERE IS NO LIST OF PEOPLE AND EMAIL ADDRESSES. They have been moved to the PEOPLE folder on the left side tool bar below the top MAIL icon. The email list in the PEOPLE folder is still in tact

My question is how do I correct this error which appears to have happened during an update.

One would think if you highlight the PEOPLE email list it could be moved back to the ADD RECIPIENT list but that does not appear to be possible.

What is the solution????????

title: Bijlages kan ik niet openen en links worden weergegeven als veel tekst
creator: patricia10
content:
Hallo,

Mijn vraag is: Ik zie dat er een paperclip/bijlage bij de mail zit, maar ik kan hem nergens openen. Welke instelling staat er niet goed?

En ik krijg alle links helemaal uitgeschreven in de mails in code, die achter de schermen kan blijven en ik wil ook graag alleen een link in 1 woord waar ik op kan klikken om bijvoorbeeld naar een website te gaan.

Ik kom er net achter dat als ik de mail archiveert dat hij dan wel goed te zien is.

Ik stuur het verschil in de bijlagen.

Heeft iemand hier een oplossing voor?

Patricia 🙏
